name: medrecord-ai
description: MedRecord AI — graba la consulta, transcribe y genera la historia clínica.

scripts.test: for f in test/sprint3_evidence.mjs test/sprint4_export.mjs test/sprint5_security.mjs test/sprint6_autofill_backup.mjs test/sprint7_encryption.mjs test/sprint8_clinical_safety.mjs test/sprint9_multiuser.mjs test/sprint10_p0.mjs test/sprint11_integridad.mjs test/sprint12_ux.mjs test/sprint13_robustez.mjs test/sprint14_legal.mjs test/sprint16_cerrojo.mjs; do echo "=== $f ==="; node "$f" || exit 1; done
